disconnect.mcgatekeeper.session_already_: An authenticated session for your account is already active
disconnect.mcgatekeeper.new_connection: Disconnected: new authenticated connection from your account
screen.mcgatekeeper.title: McGatekeeper - Key Management
screen.mcgatekeeper.warning: Warning: exported files contain private keys — store them securely.
screen.mcgatekeeper.clear_confirm_body: This deletes all saved keypairs. You will need to re-authorize on each server.
screen.mcgatekeeper.delete_confirm_body: This removes the saved keypair for %s. You will not be able to join that server until an admin re-authorizes you.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.mcgatekee:
Replaces username/password login with cryptographic key authentication. Every player holds a unique digital key the server recognises — no password to guess or steal.

Designed for offline-mode servers where the operator personally knows every player.
